prompt_text: A whimsical night scene on a house's front porch, viewed through a fisheye lens. A white rabbit, standing upright on its hind legs, is dressed in an elaborate blue jacket with gold trim, a beige waistcoat, and a white shirt, resembling the White Rabbit from Alice in Wonderland. To the left, an orange pumpkin and a smaller white pumpkin sit on a doormat. The porch has wooden floorboards, a white-sided house wall, and white railings. A bright overhead porch light illuminates the scene, casting a glow on the rabbit and the immediate surroundings against a dark night sky. A 'ring.com' logo is visible in the top left corner, and 'Sora ' in the bottom left, indicating the source and creator.

cinematography.mood: Whimsical, humorous, slightly frantic, and curious.
cinematography.cameraShot: High-angle, extreme wide-angle fisheye lens, mimicking a security camera or doorbell cam view. The shot is static throughout.

actions: The rabbit stands upright on the porch, holding a gold pocket watch on a chain in its left paw.
The rabbit looks down at the pocket watch.
The rabbit slightly shifts its gaze and head.
The rabbit brings the pocket watch closer to its face, looking at it intently.
The rabbit leans in towards the camera, filling a significant portion of the frame with its face, its nose and whiskers prominently visible, and its eyes wide.
dialogue: Voiceover (distressed, British accent): Oh dear, oh dear!
